local function fibonacci(limit)
return coroutine.wrap(function()
local a, b = 0, 1
for _ = 1, limit do
coroutine.yield(a)
a, b = b, a + b
end
end)
end
local function safeCall(fn, ...)
local ok, result = pcall(fn, ...)
if not ok then
print("Error: " .. tostring(result))
return false, nil
end
return true, result
end
